entries.notes: Classic SICP 2nd edition (1996), MIT Press, ISBN 978-0262510875. Verified.
Dragon Book 2nd edition (2006), Addison-Wesley. Verified. Suggest adding ISBN 978-0321486813 for completeness, but not required.

entries.issue: Key year (2021) does not match entry year (2020); paper is arXiv:2003.04821 from March 2020. Per bib-check.md §5, key/year mismatch within 1 year is silent, but the conventional fix is to make them match.

suggested_fix.rename_note: Renaming the bib key requires updating every [@banbury2021benchmarking] reference in the associated source files (.qmd, .tex, etc.) to [@banbury2020benchmarking]. Alternatively, change `year = {2020}` to `year = {2021}` if the key year is intentional (e.g., based on a later revision).

entries.notes: JOSE 2(11), DOI 10.21105/jose.00032 verified. Pages = '32' (article number) could be added but not strictly required for JOSE.
JAX GitHub repo. Software citation, no formal venue. URL resolves.
The Process of Education, Harvard University Press, 1960. ISBN verified.
arXiv:1604.06174, Chen et al. 2016. Sublinear memory cost paper. URL resolves.

entries.issue: Entry has BOTH `journal = {USENIX Winter}` AND `booktitle` fields — anomalous for an @inproceedings type. The `journal` field should be removed (booktitle is the correct field for a conference paper).

suggested_fix.rationale: @inproceedings entries should not have a `journal` field; the `booktitle` field correctly identifies the venue. The presence of both is a copy-paste artifact.

entries.issue: Missing publisher (NeurIPS → Curran Associates per rule §3). Missing URL/DOI. Venue name should be expanded to 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)' per rule §2.

add_fields.journal: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)

entries.issue: Key year (2004) does not match entry year (2005). The original Routledge/Taylor & Francis publication was 2004; the DOI 10.1201/9781482287325 corresponds to the 2005 Taylor & Francis edition. Within the 1-year tolerance per rule §5, so silent, but worth flagging.

alternatives: Change `year = {2005}` to `year = {2004}` if citing the original Routledge edition
Rename key to `fincher2005computer` to match the entry's DOI/edition (requires updating every [@fincher2004computer] reference)

entries.issue: Key year (2015) does not match entry year (2016). Original Morgan & Claypool publication was 2015; the DOI 10.1007/978-3-031-02216-6 corresponds to the Springer reprint (2022 in Springer's catalog, but the entry says 2016). Within 1-year tolerance per rule §5.

alternatives: Change `year = {2016}` to `year = {2015}` if citing the original Morgan & Claypool edition (and update publisher from 'Springer International Publishing' to 'Morgan & Claypool')
Rename key to `guzdial2016learner` to match the entry's year

entries.notes: tinygrad GitHub repo by George Hotz. Software citation. URL resolves.
MDPI Information journal, 2020, 11(2):108. DOI 10.3390/info11020108 verified.
Stanford CS231n course. URL resolves to course homepage.
MIT 6.S081 xv6 textbook, RISC-V edition 2023. URL resolves to PDF.
Cognition and Instruction 26(3):379-424, DOI 10.1080/07370000802212669. Verified.
micrograd GitHub repo by Karpathy. Software citation. URL resolves.
Industry report from Keller Executive Search, 2025. URL resolves.

entries.issue: Adam was published at ICLR 2015 (poster). The current entry cites the arXiv preprint (1412.6980, December 2014). The arXiv form is bibliographically correct (the year matches the arXiv submission), but many bibliographies prefer the ICLR 2015 venue citation. The key (2014) and year (2014) match the arXiv version.

alternatives: Keep as-is (arXiv preprint citation is acceptable)
Update to @inproceedings citing ICLR 2015 (with publisher OpenReview.net per rule §3); this would also require renaming key to `kingma2015adam` and updating all [@kingma2014adam] refs

entries.notes: ITiCSE 2001, ACM, pages 33-36, DOI 10.1145/377435.377461. Verified.
CIFAR-10/100 technical report, University of Toronto, 2009. Verified. Could add URL = https://www.cs.toronto.edu/~kriz/learning-features-2009-TR.pdf for liveness.
Situated Learning, Cambridge University Press, 1991. ISBN and DOI verified.

entries.issue: Author names use initials only (Y. Lecun, L. Bottou, Y. Bengio, P. Haffner). Per rule §4a, full first names should be used when canonically known: Yann LeCun, Léon Bottou, Yoshua Bengio, Patrick Haffner. Also note 'Lecun' should be 'LeCun' (capital C).

suggested_fix.update_author_field: LeCun, Yann and Bottou, L{\'e}on and Bengio, Yoshua and Haffner, Patrick

entries.issue: Missing pages and volume. Per rule §4, conference papers with available page numbers must include them. MLSys 2020 vol 2 pages 336-349. Publisher should be 'MLSys' or 'mlsys.org' per existing convention.

entries.notes: Thinking in Systems: A Primer, Chelsea Green Publishing, 2008. Verified. Could add ISBN 978-1603580557 for completeness.
ISL10 'Improving Student Learning: Theory and Practice Ten Years On', Oxford Brookes Univ, pages 412-424. Verified.
ICLR 2018 paper, OpenReview r1gs9JgRZ. Already has expanded venue and publisher per rules. Verified.
Forthcoming book by V. Janapa Reddi, MIT Press 2025. URL resolves.
Mindstorms, Basic Books, 1980. ISBN verified.

entries.issue: Booktitle should be expanded per rule §2: '2019 IEEE International Symposium on Performance Analysis of Systems and Software (ISPASS)' is mostly correct but the venue convention for ISPASS isn't on the rule's standard expansion list. Current form is fine. Real issue: the URL resolves but the DOI value `10.1109/ispass.2019.00042` should be uppercased to `10.1109/ISPASS.2019.00042` for consistency. Minor issue, but flagging.

entries.notes: arXiv:2104.10350. Note: a journal version was later published in IEEE Computer 55(7):18-28 (2022), which would be a more authoritative citation, but the arXiv preprint is acceptable.
International Encyclopedia of Education, 2nd ed, Pergamon Press, 1992. Verified. Pages would be ideal but historically encyclopedia entries vary.
PyTorch 0.4.0 release notes. URL resolves to GitHub release tag.

entries.issue: Key year (2020) does not match entry year (2019); within 1-year tolerance per §5. More importantly, the entry cites the arXiv preprint (1911.02549, Nov 2019), but the paper was published at ISCA 2020 (DOI 10.1109/ISCA45697.2020.00045, pages 446-459). For a reference to the published version, the entry should be @inproceedings with proper venue.

alternatives: Change to @inproceedings citing ISCA 2020: booktitle = 'International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA)', publisher = 'IEEE', pages = '446--459', doi = '10.1109/ISCA45697.2020.00045', year = 2020
Keep as @article preprint and change `year = {2019}` to `year = {2020}` to match key (or rename key to `reddi2019mlperf`)

entries.issue: Author 'Rosenblatt, F.' uses initial only. Per rule §4a, full first name should be used when canonically known: Frank Rosenblatt.
